title: Medal of Futility

The '''Medal of Futility''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot medal awarded for successfully completing eight tours of duty. Its curious name may have to do with the futility of Admiral [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s insurrection and his failure to [[T/D Technology|secure]] the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] technology for himself. It reflects the futility of the numerous attacks against the convoy carrying the TIE Defender prototypes, which passed through a very risky journey before being delivered to Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

It also may be an allusion to the futility of the Rebels' cause.

==Design==
The ribbon was colored red and had three white stripes on each side. The medal itself had three prong shapes at the bottom and was primarily gold, with a hollow opening possessing a white surface that was adorned with the Imperial Crest, colored blue.

{{Imp-stub}}
